findings.evidence: `rg -n "instAddCommMonoid|instAddCommGroupRing" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule` shows `Hom.lean:101: instance instAddCommMonoid : AddCommMonoid ...` and `Preadditive.lean:123: instance instAddCommGroupRing : AddCommGroup ...`.
findings.fix: Rename it to `instAddCommGroup` (or make it anonymous) so the declaration name describes `AddCommGroup (Hom R C M N)`.
findings.issue: `instAddCommGroupRing` names the `CommRing R` context, not the introduced structure; adjacent API uses conclusion-based names such as `Comodule.Hom.instAddCommMonoid`.

summary: One introduced instance name describes the strengthened assumption rather than the conclusion and is inconsistent with the adjacent API.
